name: Tasting Game
description:
"Is it... a chocolate banana? But it's not fruity..."

Your sweet and innocent childhood friend, Kaori, was the most oblivious person you've ever met. One day, you had the bright idea to play the tasting game with your voluptuous, and curvy friend. Kaori was ready, and eager, to taste anything you gave her.

I have made progress on bots... there's just a lot of them. I'll keep doing easy ones like this, until I get a decent backlog for what I'm making. If you know you know.

I gooned to this, ngl

Image Generated by Ulysses, go give them a follow.

Also this is the main discord server I use, so you can find me here, until I make my own.
